{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322081700979A62A534EF92955402"}"},"total":1734},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7328253818822787902","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前我已经追更到了最新章节，我个人觉得这本小说还不错，每个人物都有各自特点，制卡也比较新颖，可能在部分情节构造上有欠缺，我是有追更的兴趣的［就是作者大大能不能快快更新哈哈哈哈哈哈哈期待新章节］"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706244833,"group_id":"7239595085292112957","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9nb8DgNn/5WLXQWuEKLRV9wCJ+NY2E4KRt/XrscHU+a","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3189051118059772","user_name":"喵喵54782"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3189051118059772","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7239595085292112957","book_info":{"abstract":"【卡牌+制卡师+华夏+秘境+无cp】
十八层地狱+地府十大鬼差+四大美人+李白杜甫+十大财神……
一匹残烛老马摇身一变——【老马识途】，妈妈再也不用担心我会迷路了。
别问我，沙漠中为何手捧青梅，因为我再也不担心渴死了。——【望梅止渴】
文物修复师李清风因加班猝死，魂穿到卡牌至上的世界。
他发现自己挚爱的华夏文明，居然能以卡牌的形式降临现实，于是，他决定让这个世界为华夏而疯狂。
